messages.content: {"snippet":"Teams that emit a trace event per step \u2014 one llm_call, tool_call, and decision each \u2014 can reconstruct any agent run end to end. Per-step tracing is the single biggest lever on mean-time-to-diagnose for agent incidents.","source":"src-obs","title":"Observability for agent runs (synthetic field note)"}
